overall.description: First-person horseback riding gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2, following a wagon through a grassy wilderness trail during golden hour. The rider ascends a hill, diverges from the wagon at a junction, and continues through open prairie as the sun rises ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail between rock formations

agents.ego_description: riding a horse following a wagon up a grassy incline between rocky outcrops

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with driver moving uphill ahead on the trail

entered.detail: worn dirt path with grass growing on the edges leading uphill
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
large gray rock formation rising beside the path
wooden wagon with canvas cover moving ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow dirt trail climbing uphill through a grassy valley. Tall pine trees line the left side while rocky outcrops rise on the right. The player follows a horse-drawn wagon up the incline as the morning sun shines brightly ahead, creating lens flare.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop trail junction overlooking wide valley

events.description: wagon turns right at trail junction while horse continues straight, revealing open valley view
path levels out at the crest of the hill with expansive view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the wagon diverges to the right at the junction

notable_agents.action: wagon turning right onto a different trail heading downhill into the valley

entered.detail: wide grassy valley stretching into the distance with morning haze
cluster of buildings visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: Reaching the crest of the hill, the trail opens into a wide vista overlooking a vast valley. The wagon ahead turns right at a junction onto a different path, while the player continues straight. The rocky outcrops and pine trees fall behind as the landscape opens up to reveal distant settlements on the rolling hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail winding through prairie

events.description: wagon disappears from view leaving the rider alone in open grassland

agents.ego_description: riding alone through open grassland following the winding dirt path

entered.detail: low shrubs and tall wild grass lining the trail edges
gentle green slopes extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The rider continues alone through expansive open grassland as the wagon is no longer visible. The trail winds through tall prairie grass with scattered bushes and rolling hills stretching to the horizon. Birds can be seen flying overhead in the clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie approaching distant industrial feature

events.description: tall smoke plume or industrial tower becomes visible on the horizon ahead
trail curves slightly left as birds fly overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail toward a distant smoke plume with birds circling overhead

entered.detail: tall thin column of smoke or steam rising vertically into the sky
flock of birds circling in the sky above the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the open prairie as a distinctive tall smoke plume becomes visible on the horizon ahead. The trail curves gently through the grassland while birds circle overhead. The sun remains low and bright, casting long shadows across the path as the terrain gradually becomes more undulating.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, uphill trail that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched prairie. It begins by ascending a narrow dirt path through a grassy valley, flanked by tall pine trees and rocky outcrops while following a horse-drawn wagon toward a bright morning sun. As the camera reaches the crest of the hill, the landscape expands into a wide vista where the wagon diverges at a junction, leaving the rider to move straight toward distant settlements on rolling hills. The scene then shifts into an expansive stretch of open grassland, with the trail winding through tall prairie grass under a clear sky filled with flying birds. Finally, the path curves through undulating terrain as a distinctive plume of smoke appears on the horizon, with the low sun casting long shadows across the open wilderness.
